title: Refinitiv Financial Instrument
description: Represents a financial instrument with its identifiers, pricing data, and metadata as used across Refinitiv Data Platform APIs.

ric.description: Reuters Instrument Code (RIC) uniquely identifying the instrument on the Refinitiv platform.

isin.description: International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the instrument.

cusip.description: Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures (CUSIP) number.

sedol.description: Stock Exchange Daily Official List (SEDOL) code.

ticker.description: Exchange ticker symbol for the instrument.

permId.description: Refinitiv Permanent Identifier (PermID) for the instrument.

lei.description: Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) for the issuing organization.

displayName.description: Human-readable display name of the instrument.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the instrument's trading currency.

exchangeCode.description: Market Identifier Code (MIC) for the exchange where the instrument is traded.

assetClass.description: The asset class category of the instrument.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the primary listing.

status.description: Current trading status of the instrument.

PricingData.description: Real-time or delayed pricing snapshot for an instrument.

open.description: Opening price for the current trading session.

high.description: Highest price in the current trading session.

low.description: Lowest price in the current trading session.

volume.description: Trading volume for the current session.

HistoricalBar.description: A single OHLCV bar from historical pricing data.

date.description: The date of the bar for interday data.
